title: Supporting the goals and ideals of a Juan Pablo Duarte Day.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
crs_summary: This resolution supports the establishment of a national day of recognition to honor Juan Pablo Duarte, the founding father of the Dominican Republic, and urges the people of the United States to observe a national day of recognition for Dominican Americans.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
